title: oldenlandia stricta subsp. arenaria
intro: Oldenlandia stricta subsp. arenaria, also known as desert broomweed or sand broomweed, is a type of flowering plant native to Africa and Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. Oldenlandia stricta subsp. arenaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of extracts or powders.
